name: CocoIndex Code MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server integrating CocoIndex for semantic code search and indexing. CocoIndex provides real-time incremental indexing of codebases with semantic search capabilities. Enables AI agents to perform semantic code search, find relevant functions/classes, and query code understanding across large repositories.
use_cases: Semantic code search across a codebase from AI coding assistance agents
Finding relevant functions and code patterns using natural language queries
Indexing codebases for AI agents to understand code structure and relationships
Codebase navigation and exploration using semantic similarity search
not_for: Teams not using CocoIndex for code indexing (requires CocoIndex setup)
Simple grep-style code search (use standard grep/ripgrep tools instead)
best_when: A development team using CocoIndex for codebase indexing wants AI agents to perform semantic code search and navigate large codebases using natural language queries.
avoid_when: You don't have CocoIndex set up. CocoIndex requires embedding and indexing infrastructure. For simple pattern search, use standard tools.

auth.notes: CocoIndex API key or local deployment credentials required. Depends on CocoIndex deployment (local vs cloud).

pricing.free_tier_limits: CocoIndex open source is free to self-host
pricing.paid_tiers: CocoIndex cloud plans for managed indexing at scale
pricing.notes: CocoIndex open source is free. Cloud plans available. MCP server is free open source (community).

known_agent_gotchas: Requires CocoIndex infrastructure to be running and indexed — not plug-and-play
Initial indexing of large codebases takes significant time
Community implementation (aanno) — not official CocoIndex server
Search quality depends on embedding model used for indexing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Codebase may contain proprietary code — keep CocoIndex deployment secure. API key required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Proprietary code indexed — secure CocoIndex deployment. API key required.
